message:
fix: use SQLITE_BUSY retry logic for all BEGIN IMMEDIATE calls (bd-ola6)

Three call sites were using raw BEGIN IMMEDIATE without retry, relying
solely on busy_timeout. Replace with beginImmediateWithRetry (exponential
backoff: 10ms..160ms, 5 retries) which handles SQLITE_BUSY_SNAPSHOT and
other cases where busy_timeout alone is insufficient.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
